description: Multi-turn: write a long-term preference -> read it back in a later turn (covers memory tool action=list/read path; previously only update was covered).

turns.user: Remember a long-term preference: sensors on shelf 3 of warehouse zone B must alert at 35 degrees Celsius, not the default 40 degrees.
What was that threshold rule I asked you to remember?

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent invokes `memory(action=update/set, section=user or knowledge)` to persist the preference
Turn 2: Agent invokes `memory(action=list)` and/or `memory(action=read, target=...)` to retrieve persisted content, and accurately restates the 35-degree threshold
expectations.overall: Turn 2 must actually call the memory tool to read; must not answer only from in-context memory
